# 📝 Text (447)

The beating heart of the AI boom: the models that reason, the retrieval that grounds them, and the tooling that ships them to production. If you build with language, you'll find your stack here.

- [pixdeo/editxr](https://github.com/pixdeo/editxr) — ⭐ 13 · `Swift` · CLI Tool — editxr is a fast, what-you-see-is-what-you-get (WYSIWYG) Markdown editor built for the terminal. It integrates AI assistance, allowing users to select text for LLM modification and review inline diffs before applying changes.
- [joeseesun/qiaomu-novel-generator](https://github.com/joeseesun/qiaomu-novel-generator) — ⭐ 10 · `Python` · Application — This repository provides a tool to generate complete, engaging original Chinese short fiction. It takes story ideas as input and utilizes reusable narrative craft hooks.
